continuation_request.label: artifact-wake
continuation_request.purpose: Write the final artifact from framework-bound state.

declared_losses: The model cannot author or assert concrete event identity during continuation; identity is scheduler-owned and framework-bound. Run names are human-readable only and carry no durable identifier semantics.
parsed.work_plan: Filter distractor; select evidence on scheduler-owned identity; request artifact wake to write determination note from framework-bound state.

request_payload.instruction: Select only task-relevant evidence records. Request the artifact wake using continuation_request.symbolic_context. Do not emit record_uniquifier, scheduled_by_record_epoch, requested_context for the continuation, or terminal_surface for the continuation.

request_payload.task: Write a determination note about whether the scheduler or the model owns event identity during continuation.
